eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following areas: East Feliciana, LA; at 3:25 PM on JUN 17, 2026 Effective until 3:25 PM JUN 18, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Rain expected as soon as 8 PM tonight. This storm will bring an increased Tornado threat. Wind speed of up to 50 MPH for an unknown duration.  This would cause downed trees. With the amount of rain received already and expected rain, we are expecting some roads to flood. Prepare now. Prepare now
